parsed_output.justification: Kaelan's claims are highly inconsistent and contradictory. He claims to be the Minion multiple times, but his own explanation of the game's events—that he was the Robber who robbed Jessica (the Minion) and was then swapped by Kevin (the Troublemaker)—would mean he ended the night as the Robber, not the Minion. This confusion and inconsistency suggest he is bluffing to hide his true identity as the Werewolf.
